backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a real estate app backend with contact form submission, contact request retrieval (admin-only), and user profile management with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the HeroSection component update (Arcos de Querétaro hero image) to its relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key styling or functional details.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: Internet Computer asset configuration that ensures the `.well-known` directory is not ignored during deployment.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Google Fonts preconnect for Inter and Playfair Display, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: Internet Computer custom domain verification file listing the two accepted domains for the app.
frontend/public/robots.txt: SEO-friendly robots.txt that allows all major crawlers (Googlebot, Bingbot, PerplexityBot, and others) to access all paths.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page landing layout by composing Header, Hero, Features, About, Contact, ScheduleConsultation, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying a business description, three trust indicators (36+ years, 500+ clients/year, 98% satisfaction), and an about-us image.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Native HTML form that submits to Formspree with four required fields (name, email, phone, message) and accessible 44px touch targets.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section combining the ContactForm with business contact details, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), and business hours, all opening external links in new tabs.
Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with four feature cards (Premium Accommodations, Prime Locations, Trusted Service, Personalized Experience) and a YouTube link button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, legal links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, subtext, and CTA buttons that scroll to the contact and features sections.
frontend/src/components/LandingHeader.ts: Renders a fixed navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Book' CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with scroll-based styling.
frontend/src/components/ScheduleConsulta: Renders a consultation scheduling section that lazily loads and displays an inline Calendly booking widget when the user clicks the 'Book' button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitContactReque: File appears to be empty or truncated; no implementation content is present.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm terracotta/colonial color theme, including light and dark mode variants for background, primary, header, footer, and other semantic tokens.
frontend/src/lib/scrollToSection.ts: Exports a `scrollToSection` utility that smoothly scrolls to a DOM element by ID, offsetting scroll position by the header's height.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and a custom `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to `sessionStorage`, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with custom fonts, shadows, border radii, animations, and responsive breakpoints, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a Querétaro tourism/landing page, tracking existing features, a pending hero-image feature request (Arcos de Querétaro full-background photo), and known deployment issues.
